title: text fromlist

messages.description: sets contents of text from given list
pointer to the text if -s flag is used

arguments.description: text name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

body: "text fromlist" converts a list such as "text tolist" would output and fills the text with it. Whatever the text had previously contained is discarded.
